modeValues.settingInterpretation: Every filter instruction in sorter memory must return true for the item to go to Export (accept).
At least one filter instruction in sorter memory must return true for the item to go to Export (accept).
The item goes to Export (accept) only when no filter instructions return true.

parameters.name: Mode
parameters.description: Sets how the sorter combines filter results. See modeValues for All, Any, and None behavior.

parameters.name: Lock
parameters.description: Locks the Logic Sorter for manual interaction when set to 1. Unlocks it when set to 0.

parameters.name: On
parameters.description: Turns the Logic Sorter on when set to 1 and off when set to 0.

parameters.name: ClearMemory
parameters.description: When set to 1, clears the import/export counter memory and then resets itself back to 0.

outputs.name: Power
outputs.description: Returns whether the Logic Sorter is powered.

outputs.name: Mode
outputs.description: Returns the current filter-combination mode. See modeValues.

outputs.name: Error
outputs.description: Returns whether the Logic Sorter is in an error state.

outputs.name: Lock
outputs.description: Returns whether the Logic Sorter is locked for manual interaction.

outputs.name: On
outputs.description: Returns whether the Logic Sorter is turned on.

outputs.name: RequiredPower
outputs.description: Returns the idle operating power required by the Logic Sorter in watts.

outputs.name: ExportCount
outputs.description: Returns how many item stacks have been exported since the last ClearMemory action.

outputs.name: ImportCount
outputs.description: Returns how many item stacks have been imported since the last ClearMemory action.

outputs.name: PrefabHash
outputs.description: Returns the Logic Sorter prefab hash.

outputs.name: NameHash
outputs.description: Returns the hash of the device's in-game custom name.
